name: Can I get extra money for pain and suffering if the equipment was old and broken?

mainEntity.name: Can I get extra money for pain and suffering if the equipment was old and broken?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp doesn't pay for pain and suffering, but a third-party lawsuit against the equipment manufacturer or a negligent maintenance company can provide these additional damages.
